reviews.comment:
El sábado 6 pedí q me llenará el tanque y el playero estaba nervioso, no lo lleno y se olvidó de devolverme la documentación,  pedí lo q me faltaba y cdo hice una cuadra me di cuenta q no lleno el tanque. No voy más,  muy irresponsable!!!

(Translated by Google)
On Saturday the 6th, I asked the attendant to fill my tank, but he seemed nervous. He didn't fill it and forgot to return my documents. I asked for the rest of the money, and after driving a block, I realized he hadn't filled the tank. I'm never going back; he's incredibly irresponsible!

reviews.comment:
El sábado al mediodía me acerque a cargar combustible. Le solicite al playero que completara el tanque ( previamente había verificado que contaba con medio tanque). "Realiza la carga", pago y me despedido.
El valor abonado me pareció muy elevado para la carga de medio tanque pero... no había controlado los aumentos de la semana... hago unos metros más y verifico que el vehiculo seguía con la misma cantidad de combustible que tenía al ingresar.
Regreso, planteo la situación....
Resulta que no habían realizado la carga y me habían cobrado $3500 de más.
Se soluciono para me pareció una situación desagradable y que se evita prestando atención.

(Translated by Google)
On Saturday at noon, I went to the gas station to fill up. I asked the attendant to fill the tank (I had previously checked that it was half full). "Fill it up," he said, I paid, and left.
The price I paid seemed very high for half a tank, but... I hadn't checked the price increases for the week... I drove a few meters further and saw that the car still had the same amount of fuel as when I pulled in.
I went back and explained the situation... It turned out they hadn't filled the tank and had overcharged me by $3500.
It was resolved, but I thought it was an unpleasant situation that could have been avoided by paying attention.
